_comment: XD-4 aggregated a11y baseline. Per-route baselines (chat.json/home.json/login.json) under tests/TravelAssistant.E2E.Tests/a11y-baselines/ are the authoritative per-screen allowlists; this file mirrors the union for tooling that expects a single artifact path (e.g. PR comment bot, XD review). Refresh by running E2E_A11Y_UPDATE_BASELINE=1 npx playwright test --grep @a11y then regenerating this file via scripts/a11y/sync-baseline.mjs.
non_axe_checks: prefers-reduced-motion honored for streaming token animation
